summary.lv: SEB Rīga meklē Konfigurācijas vadītāju/-u — ieviešt un automatizēt Configuration Management Database (CMDB) Jira Assets platformā, integrējot ar Lansweeper.
summary.en: SEB Riga is looking for a Configuration Manager to implement and automate CMDB in Jira Assets, integrated with Lansweeper, across cloud and hybrid environments.
